arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ElastiCache replication group.

auth_token_enabled.description: Indicates whether an authentication token is enabled for the replication group.

automatic_failover_enabled.description: Shows if automatic failover is enabled for the replication group.

cluster_mode.description: The cluster mode of the ElastiCache replication group.

configuration_endpoint_address.description: The configuration endpoint address of the replication group.

description.description: A description of the ElastiCache replication group.

id.description: The ID of the ElastiCache replication group.

log_delivery_configuration.description: The configuration for log delivery, including destination and format.

member_clusters.description: The list of member clusters in the replication group.

multi_az_enabled.description: Indicates if Multi-AZ is enabled for the replication group.

node_type.description: The type of node used in the replication group.

num_cache_clusters.description: The number of cache clusters in the replication group.

num_node_groups.description: The number of node groups (shards) in the replication group.

port.description: The port number on which the replication group is accepting connections.

primary_endpoint_address.description: The primary endpoint address of the replication group.

reader_endpoint_address.description: The reader endpoint address of the replication group.

replicas_per_node_group.description: The number of replica nodes in each node group.

snapshot_retention_limit.description: The number of days for which ElastiCache retains automatic snapshots.

snapshot_window.description: The daily time range during which automatic snapshots are created.
